_description: Widescreen spotlight card for presentations, pitch decks, and desktop carousels. Two-column layout: text content on the left, featured image on the right with a gradient fade and accent border. Ideal for team intros, testimonials, product features, and speaker cards. Keep bg and ink consistent across all slides; vary only accent.

_slots.image: REQUIRED — featured image. Headshot, product photo, or scene. Displayed in the right column (640px wide, full height) with object-fit: cover. Portrait-oriented photos work best — landscape photos will crop to the tall narrow column. Local path or URL.
_slots.heading: REQUIRED — primary text in the left column. A name, quote, or short title. 2–10 words at 80px bold serif.
_slots.body: optional — supporting text. Role, attribution, or 1–3 sentences. Shown at reduced opacity below the heading.
_slots.eyebrow: optional — short uppercase label above the rule (e.g. 'FOUNDER', 'TESTIMONIAL', 'FEATURED'). Displayed in accent color.
_slots.footer: optional — bottom-left text. Handle, brand, or attribution (e.g. '@yourcompany').
_slots.bg: optional — background hex color. Also the gradient-fade target from the image. Use the SAME value on every slide. Default: #0c0b09
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. Use the SAME value on every slide. Default: #eae6de
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for eyebrow, rule, and image border. VARY per slide. Default: #d4a054

title: Meet the Team

slides.heading: Alex Chen
slides.body: Built three startups before turning thirty. Believes the best code is the code you delete. Now leading product at the intersection of design and engineering.

slides.heading: Maya Rodriguez
slides.body: Fifteen years shaping interfaces at companies you've used today. Obsessed with whitespace and the details nobody notices until they're gone.

slides.heading: James Okafor
slides.body: Systems thinker. Turns messy problems into clean architectures. Previously built infrastructure serving two hundred million requests a day.

slides.heading: Priya Sharma
slides.body: Scaled two products from zero to a million users. Data-driven but story-first.
